metadata.description: Palate: the taste layer for AI website builders. Install the Palate website-builder plugin (skill + MCP-depth hooks + the Palate MCP connector) for Claude Code.

plugins.name: palate-website-builder
plugins.description: Builds production-grade Astro websites grounded by the Palate MCP (real design taste from deeply-analysed reference sites), plus brand packages. Bundles the skill, the survey/verify agents, and the MCP-depth enforcement hooks. After install, connect the Palate MCP with one `claude mcp add` command (free token at app.palatemcp.com).
